impact: The daemon had no selectable work after completing the sign-permit tranche. This replacement preserves completed work and adds eight narrow Urban Forestry tasks ordered from fixture skeletons and validation guards through mocked DevHub guardrails, without live crawling or authenticated automation.
summary: Append the next fixture-first PP&D permit-family tranche to the task board.
target_task: Supervisor repair: all PP&D daemon tasks are complete; review the original PP&D goal and add the next task-board tranche

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
